info.title: Portal User Type
info.description: Portal User Type API is used to create, read, update and delete user group for a portal in ZOHO CRM. A portal user type defines a set of permissions and access levels for users associated with that portal. This API allows administrators to manage user types, assign specific permissions to different modules, and control the access rights of portal users effectively. It helps in organizing and securing data by ensuring that users have appropriate access based on their roles within the portal.

get.description: Retrieve all user types for the specified portal.

schema.description: Response schema for listing portal user types.

user_type.description: Array of portal user type objects.

default.description: Indicates if this is the default user type.

api_name.description: API name of the personality module.

plural_label.description: Plural label for the personality module.

active.description: Indicates if the user type is active.

modules.description: Modules accessible by this user type.

read_only.description: Indicates if the field is read-only.

display_label.description: Display label for the default view.

deleted.description: Indicates if the custom view is deleted.

active_user_count.description: Number of active users for this user type.

deactive_user_count.description: Number of deactivated users for this user type.

created_by.description: User who created this user type.

created_time.description: Timestamp when the user type was created.

api_name.description: API name of the invitation field.

modified_by.description: User who last modified this user type.

modified_time.description: Timestamp when the user type was last modified.

post.description: Create one or more portal user types for the specified portal. Request body must include a user_type array with one or more user type objects.

requestBody.description: Payload to create portal user types. Each user_type item must include personality_module, name, modules and invitation_field.

schema.description: Request schema for creating portal user types.

user_type.description: Array of user type objects to create.

items.description: Portal user type object for creation.

personality_module.description: Personality module details for the user type.

api_name.description: API name of the personality module.

id.description: Long id represented as digits string.

plural_label.description: Plural label for the personality module.

modules.description: Modules to assign to this user type.

read_only.description: Indicates if the field is read-only.

deleted.description: Indicates if the custom view is deleted.

api_name.description: API name of the invitation field.

schema.description: Successful response schema for created portal user types.

user_type.description: Array of created portal user type objects.

schema.description: Multiple error response schema for invalid portal user type creation.

oneOf.description: Wrapped error response schema for invalid portal user type creation.

get.description: Retrieve details for the specified portal user type.

200.description: Successful response with user type details.

schema.description: Response schema for retrieving a portal user type.

user_type.description: Array of portal user type objects.

put.description: Update the specified portal user type. Request body must include user_type array with items containing the fields to update.

requestBody.description: Payload to update portal user type(s). Provide the complete user_type array; partial-update semantics are not assumed.

schema.description: Request schema for updating portal user types.

user_type.description: Array of portal user type objects to update.

items.description: Portal user type object for update.

personality_module.description: Personality module details for the user type.

api_name.description: API name of the personality module.

id.description: Long id represented as digits string.

modules.description: Modules to assign to this user type.

200.description: Successful update response with updated user type(s).

schema.description: Successful update response schema for updated portal user type(s).

user_type.description: Array of updated portal user type objects.

schema.description: Multiple error response schema for invalid portal user type update.

oneOf.description: Wrapped error response schema for invalid portal user type update.

delete.description: Delete the specified portal user type.

200.description: Successful deletion response with remaining user types.

schema.description: Response schema for updated portal user type(s).

user_type.description: Array of updated portal user type objects.

Portal.name: portal
Portal.description: Portal unique name (path parameter). Provide the portal identifier as defined in the account.

UserTypeId.name: userTypeId
UserTypeId.description: Unique id of the portal user type. Represented as a long numeric id encoded as a string.

details.description: Additional error details; may be empty object.
